Head Chef Of The Week — Big South

VG

Head Chef Nominee
I would actually like to nominate VG this week. When we announced we were looking for 20% in offers, every day the store has been in the 40-60% range. And no matter what the market needs, whether it be in his store or anyone else's he's there at the drop of a hat.
